SELECT event_time AS original_time, toUnixTimestamp(original_time) AS unix_timestamp FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_time AS original_time, toUnixTimestamp(original_time, 'Europe/London') AS unix_timestamp_london FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_time AS original_time, toUnixTimestamp(original_time, 'America/New_York') AS unix_timestamp_ny FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_time AS original_time, toUnixTimestamp(toDate(original_time)) AS unix_timestamp_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_time AS original_time, toUnixTimestamp(toDateTime(original_time)) AS unix_timestamp_datetime FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_time as original_time, toUnixTimestamp(toDateTime64(original_time, 3)) AS unix_timestamp_datetime64 FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_time AS original_time, toUnixTimestamp(toDate32(original_time)) AS unix_timestamp_date32 FROM test_dates;

SELECT original_time, toUnixTimestamp(original_time) AS unix_ts, (SELECT toUnixTimestamp(original_time) FROM test_dates WHERE event_time < '2020-01-01 00:00:00') AS subquery_timestamp FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_time, toUnixTimestamp(original_time) AS unix_ts FROM (SELECT event_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_time > '2010-01-01 00:00:00') as filtered_dates;
SELECT dt.event_time, toUnixTimestamp(dt.event_time) AS unix_ts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates rd WHERE rd.event_time < dt.event_time) AS count_before FROM test_dates dt;
